request: Tell me a story about a duck named Ducky.
chosen:
Once upon a time, there was a duck named Ducky. Ducky was a good duck. He loved to play with his friends in the pond. They would splash and play together in the pond. They all had a great time.
One day, Ducky went to the pond to play. He splash in the water and laughed. His friends saw Ducky and said, "Buddy, you look at the pond!" Ducky was scared. He thought it was a good idea.
They swam to the pond every day. Ducky would watch Ducky play with his friends and have a great day. And they all had a great day.

One day, Ducky was feeling sad. He asked his friend, Bunny,, to help him find his way. Bunny was excited and wanted to help. They looked for the medicine together.
As they looked, Bunny's home was gone. Ducky was sad, but he asked Bunny for help. Bunny said they were excited. They looked around and found a pretty medicine together. With a big smile, Ducky was finally hiding in the medicine.
Ducky and Bunny were happy again. They played with their toys outside and had a lot of fun. From that day on, Ducky felt strong and always had fun with his friends.

chosen:

request: Tell me a story about a fish named Fin.
chosen:

Fin swam to show everyone where to go home. But the nut was too big for Fin. So, Fin had an idea. He said to his friends, "Let's go home and get some food from the tree." So, they all got to theable nut. They all got to go home, and Fin was very happy. The moral of the story is to always take care of friends and take care of them.

request: Tell me a story about a dog named Spot.
chosen:
Once upon a time, there was a dog named Spot. Spot was a very important dog. He loved to play with his ball and run around in the park. One day, Spot saw a big rock in the park. He wanted to play with it all day long.
Spot saw a little girl named Sue. Sue had a toy car too. Spot said, "No, I am sorry, I like my toy car." Sue was sad and didn't know what to do. With a little help, Spot could play with Sue's toy car.
Spot and Sue played with the toy car together. They had so much fun! Spot's mom was happy too, because she said Spot was a good dog too. They all played together and had a great day.

request: Tell me a story about a frog named Remy.
chosen:
Once upon a time, there was a frog named Remy. Remy lived in a big pond. He liked to play with his friends, but they liked to run and jump all day.
One day, Remy found a big cave. He thought it would be fun to play with the cave. But, when he got inside, he looked inside the cave, he saw a big, scary monster. The monster was scary, and Remy was very scared.
Remy's mom saw him and came to help. She told Remy, "I will be friendly to the scary monster. But you must be friendly to the scary monster." Remy listened to his mom and went to the scary monster. Soon, the monster was not scary at all. He was just happy and went back to his friends.
